title: Bacofoil The Original Kitchen Foil XL 5m x 45cm
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: The Original Bacofoil kitchen foil features extra tear-resistant construction for reliable food wrapping and storage
GENEROUS SIZE: Extra-wide 45cm width and 5m length provides ample coverage for larger dishes and cooking needs
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Pack includes two rolls of kitchen foil, ensuring you always have a backup roll ready
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for wrapping, storing, and cooking food with its durable diamond-structured surface
EASY HANDLING: Specially designed for smooth, controlled tearing and effortless application
description: Product description Discover the premium quality of Bacofoil Original Kitchen Foil, now available in a convenient pack of two. Each roll measures an impressive 45cm in width and 5m in length, giving you ample coverage for all your kitchen needs. This extra tear-resistant foil features a unique structure that makes it exceptionally durable and easy to handle. Perfect for wrapping, storing, and cooking, this foil maintains its strength and reliability whether you're covering large dishes, lining baking trays, or creating parcels for oven cooking. The generous 45cm width ensures excellent coverage for larger items, while the tear-resistant quality means you'll get clean, straight edges every time you use it. The foil's sturdy construction helps prevent those frustrating tears and splits that can occur with standard alternatives. Each roll comes in a practical box with a cutting edge for convenient dispensing, making it an essential addition to any kitchen. Manufacturer Contact Information Melitta UK Ltd., Hortonwood 45, Telford, Shropshire, UK, TF1 7FA.
